Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

Class AutoTactics.DTDestrWDTac

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.AutoTactics.DTDestrWDTac
All Implemented Interfaces:
ITactic
Enclosing class:
AutoTactics
public static class AutoTactics.DTDestrWDTac extends Object implements ITactic
Discharges any sequent that has the form of the WD of a datatype destructor.
Since:
2.1

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public Object apply(IProofTreeNode initialNode, IProofMonitor pm)
      Description copied from interface: ITactic
      Applies this tactic to a proof tree at a specific node.

      The convention is that a tactic applied at a particular node is allowed to modify only the subtree rooted at that node, but this is not checked.

      Specified by:
      apply in interface ITactic
      Parameters:
      initialNode - The proof tree node at which this tactic should be applied
      pm - The proof monitor to monitor the progress of the tactic
      Returns:
      null iff the application was successfull.

      Note : The current convention for the return type is that in case the tactic was not successful, the proof tree is not modified, and the reason for tactic failure can be read from the toString() method from the object returned. In the near future the return type for the tactic will be refined to return more information useful for composing tactics. Implementors should therefore not rely on the return type at this time.

      See Also:
      • IProofMonitor

    • getAppli

      private static AutoTactics.DTDestrWDTac.Appli getAppli(Predicate goal)

      private static String[] getNames(Expression[] children)
